title: Hamiltonian Simulation with Qubitization
subtitle: Hamiltonian Simulation with Qubitization (Chebyshev LCU)
description: Implementation of time-independent Hamiltonian simulation via the Qubitization (Chebyshev LCU) method. The algorithm expresses the time evolution as a linear combination of Chebyshev polynomials of the Szegedy walk operator, using the Jacobi–Anger expansion coefficients as LCU weights. Unlike GQSP and QSVT, Qubitization requires no classical angle preprocessing but uses O(log d) ancilla qubits. The select operation over walk operator powers is implemented with an efficient binary-decomposition circuit analogous to QPE.
